content: Hello! Welcome to Tasklet support. How can I help you today?
I'm trying to figure out how to set up a recurring schedule trigger. I can't find it in the UI.
Sure, that's a general how-to question. Which part of the UI are you currently in?
I'm on the agent page, I see Connections and Triggers but I don't know where to go from there.
Got it. Click on Triggers, then select Add Trigger. You'll see a Schedule option. From there you can set a cron expression or choose a simple interval like daily or weekly.
Oh I see it now! That makes sense.
